22.reason: [The recursive call to generate permutations is made even when the base case condition (m == n+1) is not met, because there's no 'else' block. This causes extra unnecessary iterations after printing a permutation, leading to incorrect behavior and potentially duplicate or malformed outputs.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The recursive call to generate permutations is made even when the base case condition (m == n+1) is not met, because there's no 'else' block. This causes extra unnecessary iterations after printing a permutation, leading to incorrect behavior and potentially duplicate or malformed outputs.]
